title: Supabase management access token missing
affects: M3-T002 (durable content-addressed ZR legal-corpus object storage — required before acceptance)
M3-T004 (durable content-addressed Construction-Code + amendment-overlay object storage — required before acceptance)
detail: Supabase MCP server is configured and resolves project URL https://dyiviaalkqxeyyxotvvh.supabase.co, but management operations return Unauthorized. Durable legal-corpus object storage depends on this token: M3-T002 and M3-T004 may develop and gate-review fixture/parser/harness increments while this is open, but neither may be ACCEPTED (nor mark its corpus domain 'implemented', nor satisfy a downstream dependency, nor unblock a feasibility claim) until durable, content-addressed official captures exist. This blocker therefore blocks acceptance of M3-T002 and M3-T004 while open (enforced by tools/project_control.py accept: an open blocker whose affects/detail names the task blocks acceptance).
exact_human_action: Create a personal access token at https://supabase.com/dashboard/account/tokens and add it to the Supabase MCP server configuration as SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN (Claude Code MCP settings), then restart the MCP connection. Do not paste the token into chat, code, or committed files.
where_to_enter: Claude Code MCP server configuration (environment of the supabase MCP server) or the harness secret store
minimum_permissions: Access to the target Supabase organization/projects; token scope is account-level (Supabase PATs are not scoped narrower today)
how_it_will_be_tested: mcp__supabase__list_tables on schema public; expected: table list or empty list, no Unauthorized error. No secret values will be printed.
